v.1
Building Your List With
Product Launches
Two Main Types of Launches
● Internal: A launch to one of your own lists.
● JV: A launch to one of your partner’s lists.

-- 1 of 10 --

2
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
Internal Launch
1. Send relevant content to your list (email, video, audio, PDF,
software, blog post)
a. First piece of content tends to be aspirational and gets
them excited about what you are sharing
b. Second piece includes some valuable teaching or tips
c. Third piece again shares some relevant content
2. After this three part content sequence, you present them with
an offer and ask them to buy

-- 2 of 10 --

3
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
JV Launch
1. Recruit one or multiple JV partners
2. Create a squeeze page (SP) that leads to your relevant content
sequence
3. Your JV partners mail on your squeeze page
4. People opt-in to your squeeze page and get added to your
“Launch List” (LL)

-- 3 of 10 --

4
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
● A few days later, you repeat the above process
● Your JV partners mail on your second squeeze page
● People are again added to your “Launch List”
● You continue to mail your new content to the people that opted
in to your first list

-- 4 of 10 --

5
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
● Repeat the process a third time
● JVs are mailing to your third squeeze page and adding more
names to your “Launch List”
● After your three pieces of content, you then introduce your
sales letter (or sales video)

-- 5 of 10 --

6
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
Mailing to Sales Letter
1. Launch your sales letter (SL)
2. Mail on sales letter to your launch list
3. JVs mail on the sales letter to their lists

-- 6 of 10 --

7
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
● JV launch produces excellent influx of visitors and email leads
● Results in a bigger, targeted list

-- 7 of 10 --

8
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
Key Benefits for Internal Launch:
● Easy to set up
● Can do them quickly
● Under the radar
● Very profitable (no affiliate commissions)
● Can do them frequently
● Not counting on partners
● Easy to control the content
● Attract JV partners (likely on your list)
Key Benefits for JV Launches:
● Bigger sales #s than internal launches (but also means big
payout and more work to recruit, motivate and communicate
with your JVs)
● Creates massive positioning in your market
● Awesome for quickly building your list

-- 8 of 10 --

9
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
Circle of Awesome Strategy:
● Start with an internal launch to build up a list (i.e. 2,000 people)
o Increase your list size and build momentum with the
internal launch
o Gather some great data on what your market wants
● Introduce JV partners
● Launch product with JV partners
o Increase your list size
o Gather more data and insights on what your market wants
next

-- 9 of 10 --

10
© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.
All Rights Reserved.
v.1
● Repeat the process and go back to an “Internal Launch” with
your bigger list and a product your market wants.
● The circle of awesome keeps moving from Internal to JV
Launches in a very strategic and profitable way!

-- 10 of 10 --
